title: draba aurea var. luteola
intro: Draba aurea var. luteola, also known as Golden Draba or Yellow Whitlow Grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, and its ability to aid in the treatment of various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Draba aurea var. luteola include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in folk medicine to treat various conditions.
